cover_prompt: Create a vertical image of a hyper-realistic 3D render of an elegant invitation envelope in soft lilac tones, featuring a luxurious lilac wax seal with intricate embossing, set against a blurred lilac-hued background with subtle bokeh lighting, the envelope flap slightly open to reveal a hint of ivory lining, cinematic lighting, photorealistic detail, Critical: No text.
sheet_prompt: Ultra-detailed, hyper-realistic 3D render of a blank ornamental invitation card, featuring an elaborate baroque-style frame in lilac-toned gilt metal, placed on a lilac-draped table adorned with delicate lilac-colored rolled pastries and confections, soft ambient light casting gentle shadows, the center of the card left intentionally blank for text overlay, cinematic photorealistic style, Critical: No text.
